query:
SELECT ar.id, ar.customer_name, ar.status, ar.allocated_count, ar.created_at,
       ar.pull_list IS NOT NULL AS has_pull_list,
       JSON_LENGTH(ar.pull_list) AS pull_list_length
FROM allocation_runs ar
WHERE ar.customer_name LIKE '%Amercare%'
ORDER BY ar.created_at DESC
LIMIT 5;
